requestTitle: Add Humulin M3 high-alert review to Order Catalog
overallReason: Local medicines governance has requested clearer search and safety wording for Humulin M3.

items.synonyms: Insulin isophane biphasic; Humulin M3 KwikPen
items.highAlertOrRestriction: High-alert insulin medicine. Local verification required before promotion.
items.currentValue: Search results do not clearly distinguish formulation and local high-alert review.
items.requestedValue: Order Catalog item should include agreed synonym and high-alert review wording.
items.validationNotes: Requester and local Informatics Pharmacist to confirm search, wording, and order behaviour in test.
